wikitext:
{{Keyword Infobox|Frail|2}}{{BD|Frail||2}} is a {{2|Debuffs|Debuff}} enemies can apply to the players. It is impossible for an enemy to be afflicted with {{BD|Frail||2}}.

While a character has {{BD|Frail||2}}, the amount of {{KW|Block||2}} received from cards played is decreased by 25% (typically), then rounded down.

At the end of its turn, one point of {{BD|Frail||2}} is decremented from the player or enemy.

== Sources ==
=== On Player ===
{{C|Shame||2}}
===Overgrowth===
*{{M|Flyconid||2}} {{Int|Flyconid|Frail Spores||2}}: 2 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
*{{M|Tracker Raider||2}} {{Int|Tracker Raider|Track||2}}: 2 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
*{{M|Kin Priest||2}} {{Int|Kin Priest|Orb of Frailty||2}}: 1 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
===Underdocks===
*{{M|Corpse Slug||2}} {{Int|Corpse Slug|Goop||2}}: 2 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
*{{M|Haunted Ship||2}} {{Int|Haunted Ship|Haunt||2}}: 2 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
*{{M|Fossil Stalker||2}} {{Int|Fossil Stalker|Tackle||2}}:  1 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
*{{M|Two-Tailed Rat||2}} {{Int|Two-Tailed Rat|Screech||2}}: 1 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
===Hive===
*{{M|Louse Progenitor||2}} {{Int|Louse Progenitor|Web Cannon||2}}: 2 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
*{{M|Crusher||2}} {{Int|Crusher|Bug Sting||2}}: 2 {{BD|Frail||2}}.

*{{M|Globe Head||2}} {{Int|Globe Head|Shocking Slap||2}}: 2 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
*{{M|Frog Knight||2}} {{Int|Frog Knight|Tongue Lash||2}}: 2 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
*{{M|Stabbot||2}} {{Int|Stabbot|Stab||2}}: 1 {{BD|Frail||2}}.
*{{M|Queen||2}} {{Int|Queen|You're Mine||2}}: 99 {{BD|Frail||2}}.

== Interactions ==
=== Order ===
* {{KW|Dexterity||2}} is  applied '''before''' multiplicative effects like {{BD|Frail||2}}.
** For example, if you have 2 {{KW|Dexterity||2}} while {{BD|Frail||2}} and play {{C|Survivor||2}}, you will gain '''7''' {{KW|Block||2}} ((8+2)×0.75) instead of '''8''' {{KW|Block||2}} ((8×0.75)+2).
** Additive effects include {{KW|Dexterity||2}}, {{BD|Fasten||2}}, and {{KW|Enchant|Enchantments|2}} such as {{KW|Nimble||2}} and {{KW|Adroit||2}}.
** Multiplicative effects are {{BD|Frail||2}}, {{BD|Unmovable||2}}, {{BD|Shadowmeld||2}}, {{R|Vambrace||2}}, {{R|Pael's Legion||2}}, and {{R|Vitruvian Minion||2}}.
* Due to rounding, {{BD|Frail||2}} disproportionately affects cards that grant {{KW|Block}} of values not divisible by 4, increasingly so the lower the value is, and the lower its remainder is when divided by 4.
** This {{KW|Block||2}} reduction is applied to Buffs that grant {{KW|Block||2}} across multiple turns, such as {{BD|Block Next Turn||2}} and {{BD|Toric Toughness||2}}.

=== Effects That Interact with Frail ===
* {{BD|Block Next Turn||2}} and {{BD|Toric Toughness||2}} depends on current turn effects, so if {{C|Toric Toughness||2}} is played while {{BD|Frail||2}}, 3 {{BD|Toric Toughness||2}} is applied, and only 3 {{KW|Block||2}} is applied for the next two turns, even if {{BD|Frail||2}} would expire before then.
* {{KW|Block||2}} gained from {{C|Sacrifice||2}} is reduced by {{BD|Frail||2}}, meaning the player gains {{KW|Block||2}} equal to 1.5x {{KW|Osty|Osty's|2}} Max HP.
* {{KW|Block||2}}-generating [[Slay the Spire 2:Relics|Relics]] and {{KW|Frost|Frost Orbs|2}} do not interact with {{BD|Frail||2}}.
* {{BD|Frail||2}} does not affect {{KW|Block||2}} gained from Buffs, including those gained by {{BD|Plating||2}}, {{BD|Rage||2}}, {{BD|Afterimage||2}}, and {{BD|Beacon of Hope||2}}.
* {{KW|Block||2}} conserved between turns by means of {{BD|Barricade||2}}, {{BD|Blur||2}}, or  {{R|Barricade||2}} is not affected by {{BD|Frail||2}}.
